features.notes: package.ts is the sole entry point: its @init() defines all custom elements (dg-viewer, dg-input-form, dg-button, etc.) and awaits their definition. styles.css is bundled by the same entry.

package.ts imports DockSpawnTsWebcomponent from @datagrok-libraries/dock-spawn-dg and registers it as the 'dock-spawn-ts' custom element; the actual class lives in the external library, not in files.src.
package.ts imports ValidationIcon from @datagrok-libraries/webcomponents and registers it as the 'dg-validation-icon' custom element.

Compute2-related changes (per CHANGELOG 1.2.6) ship via the InputForm/Viewer/DGToggleInput etc. wrappers registered in package.ts; no Compute2-specific source file exists in this thin runtime package.
